dialect:
inheritClients="true" label="%tree.externaltables.node.name" logo="icons/greengage_logo.svg" optional="true" bundle="!drivers.postgresql"/>
name="Cloudberry" <file type="jar" path="maven:/org.postgresql:postgresql:RELEASE[42.7.2]" <manager class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.greenplum.edit.GreenplumTableManager"
categories="sql,analytic"> <treeInjection path="postgresql/database/schema/table"
iconBig="icons/greenplum_icon_big.png"
databaseDocumentationSuffixURL="Database-driver-Greengage"
<file type="jar" path="maven:/net.postgis:postgis-jdbc-jtsparser:RELEASE[2.5.0]"
propertiesURL="https://jdbc.postgresql.org/documentation/head/connect.html#connection-parameters"
icon="icons/cloudberry_icon.png" optional="true" bundle="!drivers.postgresql"/> <manager class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.greenplum.edit.GreenplumExternalTableManager"
propertiesURL="https://jdbc.postgresql.org/documentation/head/connect.html#connection-parameters" label="Greenplum"
sampleURL="jdbc:postgresql://{host}[:{port}]/[{database}]" name="Greenplum" objectType="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.greenplum.model.GreenplumFunction"/>
defaultPort="5432" description="%datasource.cloudberry.description"
bundle="!drivers.postgresql"/> label="Greengage" logo="icons/cloudberry_logo.png"
<manager class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.greenplum.edit.GreenplumFunctionManager"
inheritProviderProperties="true"> customURL="true" turnOffPreparedStatements="true"/>
class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.greenplum.model.PostgreServerGreengage"
ignore-dependencies="true" optional="true" bundle="!drivers.postgresql"/> label="Greenplum" inheritProviderProperties="true"> <folder type="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.greenplum.model.GreenplumExternalTable" <file type="jar" path="maven:/net.postgis:postgis-geometry:RELEASE[2.5.0]"
name="Greengage" webURL="https://cloudberry.apache.org/"
<file type="jar" path="maven:/net.postgis:postgis-jdbc-jtsparser:RELEASE[2.5.0]"
class="org.postgresql.Driver" <folder type="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.postgresql.model.PostgreTableColumn" <serverType id="greenplum"
inheritClients="true"
propertiesURL="https://jdbc.postgresql.org/documentation/head/connect.html#connection-parameters" iconBig="icons/cloudberry_icon_big.png"
description="%driver.cloudberry.description" <file type="jar" path="maven:/net.postgis:postgis-jdbc:RELEASE[2.5.0]" ignore-dependencies="true" parent="postgresql"
icon="icons/greengage_icon.svg" id="cloudberry" inheritClients="true" class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.greenplum.model.PostgreServerGreenplum" label="Greengage"
drivers:
categories="sql,analytic"> id="greengage"
<file type="jar" path="maven:/net.postgis:postgis-geometry:RELEASE[2.5.0]"
class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.greenplum.GreengageDataSourceProvider"
id="cloudberry-jdbc" description="%datasource.greenplum.description" dialect="greenplum"
id="greenplum" <file type="jar" path="maven:/org.postgresql:postgresql:RELEASE[42.7.2]"
class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.greenplum.GreenplumDataSourceProvider"
objectType="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.greenplum.model.GreenplumExternalTable"/> <file type="jar" path="maven:/net.postgis:postgis-geometry:RELEASE[2.5.0]" class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.greenplum.CloudberryDataSourceProvider" sampleURL="jdbc:postgresql://{host}[:{port}]/[{database}]"
bundle="!drivers.postgresql"/>
label="Cloudberry" id="greengage-jdbc"
webURL="https://greenplum.org/" databaseDocumentationSuffixURL=""
iconBig="icons/greengage_icon_big.svg" class="org.postgresql.Driver" sampleURL="jdbc:postgresql://{host}[:{port}]/[{database}]"
<items label="%tree.externaltable.node.name" path="externalTable" property="externalTables" icon="icons/greenplum_icon.png" description="%driver.greengage.description"
